hook: Consent works best when the other person feels free enough to be fully present, not just technically agreeable.
body: Mutual enthusiasm creates a different emotional quality than mere absence of resistance.

hook: Men sometimes focus so much on the move itself that they stop noticing whether the other person is actually settling in or shrinking back.
body: Look for participation, relaxation, and ease rather than trying to interpret the minimum possible signal as enough.

hook: Look for participation, relaxation, and ease rather than trying to interpret the minimum possible signal as enough.
body: When someone is leaning in, relaxed, and reciprocating, the moment feels different than when the energy is guarded or uncertain.

hook: When someone is leaning in, relaxed, and reciprocating, the moment feels different than when the energy is guarded or uncertain.
body: Pay as much attention to her comfort and contribution as to your own desire to advance the moment.
